name: shen-cas
_doc: Bifrost suite manifest for shen-cas. Lets Bifrost drive shen-cas's own
test suite across every Shen port Bifrost supports and assert the ports
AGREE (byte-identical normalised stdout) AND each reports the harness's
Ports are resolved from Bifrost's own adapters.json (launcher locations
are machine-global). 'root'/'default_cwd' default to this file's dir, so

cases.name: cas-self-suite
cases.doc: shen-cas loads its full kernel + runs run-all-tests on every port; all ports must produce identical output AND report 'ALL PASS'.
